name: Orion Atlas Capture
description: Atlas-capture scene for the Orion (heavy mercenary gunship). Mesh adopted 2026-05-03 from a Wing Commander fan-archive 'DD_TUG' model after the original WCU orion mesh produced featureless blob renders. New mesh: 24050 tris, 12 distinct material zones (REDLIGHT nav lights, DARKENGINE engine pods, MERCHGREY hull, DKER_3 tan trim, JTUGYBLK yellow/black hazard stripes, etc.) — gives the studio sun something to bite against and gives the AI sprite generator high-information per-pixel signal. euler_deg [0, 172.5, 180] = yaw 172.5 deg + roll 180 deg to align the mesh's native nose-tail axis with the canonical orion orientation (rear at az 0). length_meters 60 matches Galaxy so the ship fills the same FOV at radius 120. ambient_floor 0.45 + spec 0.5 are the same defaults Galaxy/Centurion use. clay_mode false because we want the textured render (per-material colour zones + planar-UV hazard stripes) for the AI to copy. Capture via tools/render_ship_atlas.py --ship orion.
